scripts.test:cli: pnpm run build:repo && vitest run src/cli-command.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:notion-local: pnpm run build:repo && ELOG_E2E_CASE=notion-to-local vitest run src/sync-matrix.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:yuque-pwd-local: pnpm run build:repo && ELOG_E2E_CASE=yuque-pwd-to-local vitest run src/sync-matrix.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:yuque-token-local: pnpm run build:repo && ELOG_E2E_CASE=yuque-token-to-local vitest run src/sync-matrix.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:notion-wordpress: pnpm run build:repo && ELOG_E2E_CASE=notion-to-wordpress vitest run src/sync-matrix.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:notion-halo: pnpm run build:repo && ELOG_E2E_CASE=notion-to-halo vitest run src/sync-matrix.e2e.test.ts
